system.effect: The character is suffering from a poison or toxin. The specific effects vary depending on the toxin, but commonly include characteristic penalties, ongoing damage, or Fatigue.
system.removal: Depends on the toxin. Some wear off after a set duration. Others require a successful Toughness test, Medicae treatment, or a specific antidote.

description.value: The character is suffering from a poison, venom, or toxic substance. When first exposed, the character must pass a Toughness test (with modifiers depending on the toxin's potency) or suffer the toxin's effects. Effects vary by toxin type but commonly include: characteristic damage, ongoing Wound loss, levels of Fatigue, or other debilitating conditions. Some toxins have immediate effects while others build over time.

system.notes: Specific effects depend on the toxin. Refer to the toxin's description for details.
